_comment: Explicit, auditable compliance rules for Bharat Petrochem Unit-2. Each rule maps a regulation to what it requires, which assets it applies to, and how to check it against real work-order evidence. interval_months drives the overdue/due-soon math (against the fixed prediction reference date). Categories make the Health/Safety/Environment coverage explicit. regulation_doc_id is only rendered as a link when the asset is actually GOVERNED_BY that document in the graph.

rules.title: Statutory boiler inspection and hydro test
rules.requires: Annual statutory boiler inspection and hydrostatic test by a competent authority.

rules.title: Tank shell inspection and thickness survey
rules.requires: Periodic external shell inspection and wall-thickness survey of storage tanks.

rules.title: Hot-work gas-testing and vent isolation verification
rules.requires: Documented gas testing and positive isolation before hot work, especially where a hot-work near-miss is on record.

rules.title: Pressure-relief valve testing
rules.requires: Periodic testing and certification of pressure-relief and safety valves.

rules.title: Environmental monitoring (Consent to Operate)
rules.requires: Periodic emission and effluent monitoring under Consent-to-Operate conditions (VOC for naphtha storage, stack emissions for the boiler).

rules.title: Occupational exposure monitoring
rules.requires: Periodic noise and gas-exposure monitoring for personnel around rotating and pressure equipment.
